meta.title: Company Profile | Company A Industries
meta.description: Discover Company A Industries — a leading engineering and manufacturing firm delivering construction equipment, power tools, and industrial solutions across India and beyond.

header.title: Company A Industries Pvt. Ltd.
header.subtitle: Engineering excellence from Pune to the world

overview.heading: About Company A
paragraphs: Established in 2005, Company A Industries has grown from a regional supplier to a nationwide leader in construction equipment and industrial tooling. Based in Pune, Maharashtra — one of India's fastest-growing industrial corridors — we design, manufacture, and distribute equipment that powers infrastructure projects across the subcontinent.

Our product portfolio spans five core categories: heavy construction machinery, material handling systems, professional power tools, industrial safety equipment, and precision surveying instruments. Each product is engineered to withstand the rigors of Indian job sites, from coastal humidity to desert heat.

With ISO 9001:2015 and CE certifications, Company A Industries serves government contractors, private builders, mining operations, and manufacturing plants. Our 24/7 service network and dedicated training academy ensure customers maximize uptime and safety on every project.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive industrial equipment catalog organized by category

items.name: Heavy-Duty Excavator X5000
items.description: 50-ton crawler excavator with reinforced boom and arm for mining and large-scale earthmoving operations.

items.name: All-Terrain Bulldozer Pro
items.description: Track-type bulldozer with adjustable blade pitch for grading, dozing, and ripping across uneven terrain.

items.name: Tower Crane TC-200
items.description: 200-meter lifting height tower crane with frequency-controlled hoisting for high-rise construction projects.

items.name: Wheel Loader WL-800
items.description: 8-ton payload wheel loader with quick-coupler system compatible with forks, buckets, and grapples.

items.name: Concrete Batching Plant CBP-120
items.description: 120 cubic meter per hour fully automatic concrete batching plant with twin-shaft mixer and PLC control.

items.name: Electric Forklift EF-3000
items.description: 3-ton capacity electric forklift with lithium-ion battery and regenerative braking for warehouse operations.

items.name: Belt Conveyor System BC-100
items.description: 100-meter modular belt conveyor with variable speed drive for aggregate and bulk material transport.

items.name: Hydraulic Pallet Truck HPT-2500
items.description: 2.5-ton manual hydraulic pallet truck with polyurethane wheels and ergonomic pump handle.

items.name: Chain Hoist CH-500
items.description: 5-ton electric chain hoist with dual-speed motor and overload protection for factory lifting.

items.name: Scissor Lift SL-1200
items.description: 12-meter working height diesel scissor lift with rough-terrain tires and extending deck platform.

items.name: Cordless Impact Drill CID-800
items.description: 20V brushless cordless impact drill with 800Nm torque and LED work light for professional fastening.

items.name: Angle Grinder Professional AGP-150
items.description: 150mm disc angle grinder with paddle switch and anti-vibration side handle for metal fabrication.

items.name: Circular Saw Heavy Duty CSH-235
items.description: 235mm blade circular saw with magnesium base and laser guide for precise timber and panel cutting.

items.name: Arc Welding Machine AW-400
items.description: 400-amp inverter arc welder with IGBT technology and hot start function for MMA and TIG welding.

items.name: Air Compressor AC-200
items.description: 200-liter tank reciprocating air compressor with oil-lubricated pump for pneumatic tool operation.

items.name: Industrial Safety Helmet ISH-Pro
items.description: HDPE shell safety helmet with six-point suspension, ratchet adjustment, and chin strap for construction sites.

items.name: Full Body Safety Harness FBH-500
items.description: Class A full-body harness with dorsal D-ring and shock-absorbing lanyard for fall arrest systems.

items.name: Cut-Resistant Work Gloves CRG-Level5
items.description: Level 5 cut-resistant gloves with nitrile-coated palm and seamless knit liner for metal handling.

items.name: Steel-Toe Safety Boots STB-800
items.description: S3-rated steel-toe safety boots with puncture-resistant midsole and waterproof leather upper.

items.name: High-Visibility Safety Vest HVV-Class2
items.description: Class 2 reflective safety vest with breathable mesh fabric and zippered pockets for road workers.

items.name: Digital Theodolite TD-500
items.description: 5-second accuracy digital theodolite with laser plummet and dual-axis compensator for angle measurement.

items.name: RTK GPS Survey System RTK-G1
items.description: Multi-constellation GNSS RTK receiver with centimeter-level accuracy and tilt compensation for surveying.

items.name: Auto Level AL-200
items.description: 28x magnification auto level with magnetic dampened compensator and stadia lines for leveling work.

items.name: Total Station TS-1000
items.description: 1-second accuracy total station with reflectorless EDM and onboard field software for mapping and layout.

items.name: Surveying Drone SD-400
items.description: Quadrotor mapping drone with RTK positioning and 20MP camera for aerial photogrammetry and topography.
